A.notes: Hand-rolled recursive-descent JSON parser using a custom JSONParseError exception (no stdlib json). All 22 cases (13 success deep-equality, 9 error) passed on first run; number parsing correctly rejects leading zero (01), trailing dot (1.), and bare fraction (.5).
